items.title: Eventful Monday leaves Bulls' Billy Donovan in limbo
items.blurb: Eventful Monday leaves Bulls' Billy Donovan in limbo — Two big events on Monday should have a big effect on Billy Donovan's future. The Chicago Bulls fired Donovan's boss, executive vice president Arturas Karnisovas, and then the University of North Carolina hired Michael Malone as their new head coach.

items.title: Bulls close door on frustrating Arturas Karnisovas era
items.blurb: Bulls close door on frustrating Arturas Karnisovas era — One year after hiring Karnisovas, the Chicago Bulls were riding high, first in the Eastern Conference. They never achieved those heights again, and Monday, the Bulls finally pulled the plug.
